zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess Muriella de Keith於1351年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔時，她的父親Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland43歲，母親Margaret Fraser23歲。她於1381年與Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年6月1日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾布坎南 卡素享年98歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess Muriella de Keith于1351年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔时，她的父亲Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland43岁，母亲Margaret Fraser23岁。她于1381年与Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年6月1日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾布坎南 卡素享年98岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Muriella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive form of   Maria  , now sometimes used as an independent given name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess Muriella de Keith was born in 1351, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Fraser, was 23. She married Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany in 1381, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 June 1449, in Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess Muriella de Keith est née en 1351, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fraser, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany en 1381, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1449, à Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterrée à Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess Muriella de Keith 1351 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fraser 23. Sie hat 1381 in Schottland, United Kingdom Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1449 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Muriella de Keith è nata il nel 1351 nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fraser, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany nel 1381, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1449, nel Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolta a Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess Muriella de Keithが1351年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで生まれた時，父Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotlandは43歳，母Margaret Fraserは23歳であった。1381年にイギリススコットランドでRobert Stewart 1st Duke of Albanyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年6月1日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアブチャナン カストルで98歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアインチマーhオメインチマーhオメ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess Muriella de Keith(이)가 1351년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fraser(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 6월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 버챈아 카스틀에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 인ch마홈 인ch마홈 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Muriella de Keith nasceu em 1351, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fraser, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany em 1381, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1449, em Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 98 anos, e foi sepultada em Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess Muriella de Keith родилась в 1351 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Keith Great Marischal of Scotland было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fraser, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany в 1381 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1449 г. в местности бучанан кастл, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и была похоронена в местности инчмахом приори, инчмахом, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany en 1381, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1449, en Buchanan Castle, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultada en Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
